category_sources: Official KhronosGroup repository describes an assembler, parser, disassembler, validator, and optimizer for SPIR-V.
source_facts.description says SPIRV-Tools provides API and commands for processing SPIR-V modules.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses the SPIR-V Tools name.
source_facts.homepage is the official KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Tools repository.
docs_sources: Official KhronosGroup repository README is the main project documentation.
Official repository docs directory contains additional SPIRV-Tools documentation such as syntax and project docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Tools; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says API and commands process SPIR-V modules.
source_facts.executables lists spirv-as, spirv-dis, spirv-val, spirv-opt, and related commands.
